title: TCS NQT Admit Card 2026 Overview

detail.title: TCS NQT Admit Card 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: TCS NQT Admit Card 2026 released online. Candidates can download the TCS National Qualifier Test hall ticket and check exam details at tcsion.com.

content.text: Tata Consultancy Services To Be Announced Hall Ticket 2026 has been released by Tata Consultancy Services on 12-03-2026 for the upcoming 2026, which will be conducted from 14-03-2026.

Students appearing in the exam must download and print their Hall Ticket to enter the examination centre, as no candidate will be permitted without a valid hall ticket. To access the Tata Consultancy Services To Be Announced admit card, students can visit the official website, tcsion.com, or use the direct Hall Ticket download link given below.
Tata Consultancy Services has issued the To Be Announced Admit Card for the 2026 on its official website. Here are the key details:

sections.heading: TCS NQT Admit Card 2026 Direct Download Link

content.text: Tata Consultancy Services has activated the official hall ticket download link for the To Be Announced Admit Card 2026. Registered candidates can check and download their admit cards through the link given below.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on TCS NQT Admit Card 2026

content.text: After downloading the Admit Card, students should verify all details carefully. The admit card/hall ticket usually includes the following:

items: Candidate's name and roll number
Registration number and course details
Exam date and reporting time
Exam center name and address
Photograph and signature
Subject/paper details (if applicable)
Important instructions for exam day

content.text: If any detail appears incorrect, contact the Tata Consultancy Services examination office immediately for rectification.

sections.heading: How to Download TCS NQT Admit Card 2026 Online?

content.text: TCS NQT has made the admit card download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view admit card on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the official website tcsion.com.
Click on the Admit Card / Hall Ticket link on the homepage.
Enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth.
Click Submit and your admit card will appear on the screen.
Download and print the admit card for exam use.
Double-check all personal details on the admit card immediately after downloading.
Carry a government-issued photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Passport) along with the admit card.
Report to the examination centre at least 30 minutes before the scheduled start time.
Mobile phones, smartwatches, and electronic devices are strictly prohibited in the exam hall.
Keep multiple printouts of the admit card to avoid last-minute issues.
